attributes.action: Get rid of the adopt me sequence in the eggs and make it randomized again
attributes.additional_details: Unfortunately that means to get the rarer pets it can take a lot of time and in-game money to buy enough eggs to get the rarer pets in game. It is quite an inconvenience and it greatly annoys me
attributes.background: There is a game called adopt me on roblox it's about  getting pets, you can buy pets from eggs. It used to be randomized but because of a new UK law it is considered "gambling." They have now added a sequence so the pets you get are no longer randomized.
